commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.review_summary:
The branch forwards `StreamOptions.stop` into Anthropic Vertex, Amazon Bedrock, and Bedrock Mantle request payloads and adds focused transport tests.

PR surface: Source +14, Tests +80. Total +94 across 6 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection shows current main defines `StreamOptions.stop` and the shared Anthropic mapper, but the three bundled transports named by the PR do not forward `stop`; this read-only review did not run local tests.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A repair lane can make the narrow conflict-aware rebase while preserving current Bedrock adaptive-thinking behavior.

target.title: fix(providers): forward stop sequences in bundled Anthropic transports
target.author: masatohoshino
